subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the namesake of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Shouldst thou seek the essence of numbers, lay hold upon the hem of the One True God, for all numbers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی عبدالبهاء اگر جوهر اعداد طلبی دست بدامن واحد حقیقی زن زیرا جمیع اعداد
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
